name: @grain/tests-ai-quality
description: AI-quality eval harness for Grain's /api/chat/stream synthesis. Tests citation grounding, citation coverage, hallucinated-quote detection, and cross-role retrieval determinism. A separate LLM-as-judge pass scores accuracy / faithfulness / role framing / citation quality / refusal handling. Real Claude CLI calls cost tokens and are gated behind RUN_AI_EVALS=1.
